findingShippingProtection: We're finding shipping protection options for your order. Please wait a moment.

xcottonConflict.title: Shipping protection update failed
xcottonConflict.description: Shipping protection may be out of sync with your cart. Refresh the page to confirm your cart total.

checkoutTakingLonger: This is taking longer than expected
checkoutTakingLongerDescription: We're still preparing your secure checkout. You can keep waiting or return to the product.
checkoutFailedDescription: Check your connection and try again. You have not been charged.

alert.confirmRemoveText: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

error.title: Shopping cart update failed
error.description: The network is somewhat unstable; the shopping cart has been restored to its previous quantity and amount. Please try again later.

cart.progressDescription: Add {missingItems} to your cart with {ownedItems} to unlock {giftItems} as a free gift.
cart.claimedDescription: Your free gift is in the cart: {giftItems}. The final discount will be applied at checkout.
